title: Welcome to the fall schedule
body: Weekly meetings begin Tuesday. New members are welcome to attend and meet the officer team.

title: Career fair preparation
body: Bring a draft resume to our next meeting for peer review and interview practice.

title: Cleanup volunteers needed
body: Volunteer registration is open for Campus Cleanup Day. Supplies will be provided.

title: Weekly wellness check-in
body: Join Monday's discussion about balancing classes, work, and campus activities.
